title: Star Wars Handbook 3: Dark Empire
content:
{{Top|rwm|title=''Star Wars Handbook'' 3: ''Dark Empire''}} {{ComicBook |not_appearance=1 |image=[[File:Handbook_darkempire.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Handbook'' 3: ''Dark Empire'' |writer=[[Peet Janes]] |penciller=Various |inker=Various |letterer=Various |colorist=[[David Nestelle|Dave Nestelle]] |cover artist=[[Dave Dorman]] |editor=[[David Land|Dave Land]] |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[April 5]], [[2000]]{{Marvel|url=comics/issue/53966/star_wars_handbook_3_dark_empire_1998_3|text=Star Wars Handbook 3: Dark Empire (1998) #3}} |pages=32 |upc= |timeline=[[10 ABY/Legends|10]]-[[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]]''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]'' |series=''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire]]'' |issue=3 }} '''''Star Wars Handbook'' 3: ''Dark Empire''''' was the third issue in the ''[[Star Wars Handbook]]'' series published by [[Dark Horse Comics]]. It was released [[April 5]], [[2000]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''The ''Star Wars Handbooks'' return with a special issue featuring the miniseries that started it all: ''Star Wars: Dark Empire''. After hitting 100,000+ copies in print and becoming an anchor in every ''Star Wars'' literature enthusiast's library, ''Dark Empire'' stands as one of the most influential ''Star Wars'' comics to date. The ''Dark Empire Handbook'' examines the characters and their driving forces in this epic struggle to save the galaxy from Emperor Palpatine's domination. Illustrated by a cross-section of comics' hottest stars!'' ==Media== ===Cover gallery===
